research_question: Does the KG add value beyond conventional feature/case traceability?
dataset: baosteel_weak_traceability_splits; reviewed case subset
primary_metrics: Hit@1/3/5 for root-cause group; trace path hit rate
secondary_metrics: case retrieval precision; explanation length; runtime
expected_claim: KG-enhanced methods should beat feature-only and case-only traceability on explanation completeness.
implementation_notes: Use top abnormal process features and expert rules only.

research_question: Which anomaly detector provides the strongest signal before KG reasoning?
dataset: baosteel_process_time_windows; anomaly labels from weak and reviewed subsets
primary_metrics: Anomaly F1; AUROC; AUPRC; root-cause Hit@k
secondary_metrics: latency; training time; missing-sensor robustness
expected_claim: The proposed KG layer should improve root-cause localization regardless of the detector backbone.
implementation_notes: Use detector residuals or attention/deviation scores as observations aligned to KG entities.

research_question: Does mechanism KG reasoning improve causal root-cause ranking?
dataset: event-centered multivariate process windows with reviewed root-cause labels
primary_metrics: Root-cause Hit@1/3/5; MRR; causal direction accuracy
secondary_metrics: counterfactual effect score; false-cause rate; runtime
expected_claim: Mechanism KG should reduce symptom/root-cause confusion and improve causal direction.
implementation_notes: Evaluate with time-lag constraints so downstream symptoms are not ranked ahead of upstream causes.

research_question: Which KG reasoning strategy best converts mechanism knowledge into trace paths?
dataset: large mechanism KG plus attached Baosteel instance/event subset
primary_metrics: Trace path Hit@k; path NDCG; explanation completeness
secondary_metrics: path length; unsupported-edge rate; expert path acceptability
expected_claim: Path-constrained KG reasoning should produce more faithful explanations than flat retrieval.
implementation_notes: Attach ProcessObservation nodes to ProcessParameter/EquipmentState/QualityDefect nodes before ranking paths.

research_question: Can LLM reasoning use the mechanism KG without hallucinating unsupported causes?
dataset: case questions generated from reviewed traceability events plus held-out mechanism KG
primary_metrics: Answer faithfulness; root-cause Hit@k; action recommendation accuracy
secondary_metrics: token/record; invalid path rate; unsupported triple rate
expected_claim: Graph-grounded LLM methods should improve faithfulness over direct LLM and flat RAG.
implementation_notes: Require every generated explanation to cite graph paths and evidence spans.

implementation_notes: Remove graph reasoning and keep detector plus LLM.

research_question: Is KG-enhanced traceability robust under realistic industrial constraints?
dataset: budgeted and shifted Baosteel traceability splits

secondary_metrics: latency; expert acceptability; missing-feature tolerance
expected_claim: Mechanism KG should stabilize traceability when labels, sensors, or stages are scarce or shifted.
implementation_notes: Train/alignment budgets: 50, 100, 300, 500, all reviewed cases.
